brief: Bitget RWA wave1 paper-fidelity full sweep

goals.title: build
goals.objective: Implement collector, engine, strategies, gates, report, and golden tests

goals.title: verify
goals.objective: Run pytest and synthetic strategy smoke
goals.evidence: python3 -m pytest -q: 5 passed; synthetic strategy smoke passed

goals.title: collect
goals.objective: Collect all 233 RWA symbols and write data manifest
goals.evidence: out/data_manifest.json: 233 rows; candle/funding parquet files 233 each; collection progress reached 233/233

goals.title: sweep
goals.objective: Run all A+B strategy/leverage combinations and artifacts

goals.title: audit
goals.objective: Perform final self-review and evidence gate
